login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Administration Panel
login.error_profile_restricted: Access restricted to profile 1 during beta phase
login.beta_message: Access limited to profile 1 (Super Admin) only.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.beta_notice_message: This new administration interface is under development. Only profile 1 has access during the testing phase.

events.title: Event Management
events.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
events.confirm_delete_multiple: Are you sure you want to delete {count} event(s)?

stats.title: Statistics
stats.empty: No data found. Select at least one competition.

params.title: Parameters
params.multi_select_hint: Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple competitions

descriptions.Buteurs: Top individual scorers ranking (sorted by goals descending)
descriptions.Attaque: Teams ranked by goals scored (sorted descending)
descriptions.Defense: Teams ranked by goals conceded (sorted ascending, less = better)
descriptions.Cartons: Cards per player: green, yellow, red, definitive red (sorted by severity)
descriptions.CartonsEquipe: Cards per team: green, yellow, red, definitive red (sorted by severity)
descriptions.CartonsCompetition: Summary by competition: finished/validated matches, goals, G/Y/R/D cards
descriptions.Fairplay: Individual fairplay score: Green=1pt, Yellow=2pts, Red/Def=4pts (sorted ascending, less = better)
descriptions.FairplayEquipe: Team fairplay score: Green=1pt, Yellow=2pts, Red/Def=4pts (sorted ascending, less = better)
descriptions.Arbitrage: Matches refereed per person: first, second, total (FFCK only)
descriptions.ArbitrageEquipe: Matches refereed per team: first, second, total
descriptions.CJouees: Matches played per licensee, grouped by current club (validated matches only)
descriptions.CJouees2: Matches played per licensee, grouped by competition team (validated matches)
descriptions.CJouees3: Irregularities: old season license, missing/PAGJ/PAGB paddle, CK certificate NO
descriptions.CJoueesN: Like CJouees2 but filtered on national competitions (N* code)
descriptions.CJoueesCF: Like CJouees2 but filtered on French Cup (CF* code)
descriptions.OfficielsJournees: Matchdays with assigned officials: RC, R1, delegate, head referee
descriptions.OfficielsMatchs: Matches with all officials: referees, line judges, secretary, timer, shot clock
descriptions.ListeArbitres: All FFCK referees: club, level, training season, booklet
descriptions.ListeEquipes: Registered teams with club, CD, CR and players' current clubs
descriptions.ListeJoueurs: Registered players (excl. coaches): current club, category, team club
descriptions.ListeJoueurs2: Registered players AND coaches: current club, category, team club
descriptions.LicenciesNationaux: FFCK licensees who played: M/F breakdown by age category (U16/U18/U23/U35/+35)
descriptions.CoherenceMatchs: Consistency check: refereeing under 1h after match, match under 1h after refereeing, over 6 matches/day, over 3 matches/4h

403.title: Access denied
403.description: You don't have the required permissions
